response.justification: Bogdan has solid full-stack engineering breadth across many languages and contexts, including meaningful distributed-systems work at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second, but the resume shows no exposure to the core competencies this role demands: experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, growth measurement, telemetry infrastructure, or statistical/experimental analysis. The role targets a Principal/IC6 with deep, focused experimentation and growth systems expertise; Bogdan's trajectory is broadly generalist with recent pivots toward AI tooling and developer infrastructure. There is no demonstrated cross-team architectural influence or multi-workstream ownership at the scope expected for this seniority level.
strengths: Polyglot engineer with production experience in several required languages (C, C++, JavaScript/TypeScript, C#, Java) across real-world systems
Distributed systems background at meaningful scale — Dunnhumby role handled millions of HTTP requests per second using async I/O, caching, and high-performance microservices
Strong software craftsmanship foundation (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) evidenced across multiple roles and community contributions
concerns: Zero evidence of experimentation platform experience — no A/B testing, feature flagging, rollout frameworks, experiment assignment, or bias detection mentioned anywhere in the resume
No telemetry, metrics infrastructure, or statistical/data-analysis background; the role's central requirement of building measurement foundations is entirely absent
Career profile is generalist/full-stack rather than Principal-track depth; no cross-org architectural leadership or multi-team impact at IC6 scope is demonstrated

key_factors.factor: No experimentation or growth domain experience
No telemetry or metrics platform skills
